chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-482 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A No.3224/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection (s) 3. For orders on M.A No.3225/2026 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 22.04.2026 Mr.Ahmed Ali Jarwar, Advocate for applicants ******* 1. Urgency granted. 2. Objection(s) Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicants Akhtar Hussain s/o Sodho Khan and Talib Hussain s/o Lal Muhammad Khaskheli seek protective bail in FIR No.90 of 2026 registered at P.S “B”-Section, Nawabshah for offences under Sections 302, 364, 324, 506/2, 337-H (ii), 34 PPC. Learned Counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicants due to malafide intentions; that the applicants being law abiding citizen wish to face trial; however, they apprehend that before reaching trial Court they might be arrested, humiliated and disgraced; therefore seeks legal protection Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicants are admitted to protective bail till 28.04.2026, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand) each and P.R bonds in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on 28.04.2026 or when the applicants surrender themselves before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
